rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: source domain only; not LLM-side prior art
NVIDIA NIM official air-gap LLM deployment; covers 'explicitly disable retrieval/web access' pillar
Combines fine-tuning + air-gapped deployment; matches both 'internalize via fine-tune' and 'retrieval-free deployment' pillars
Sovereign/offline inference behind firewalls; matches 'air-gapped/sovereign deployments where retrieval is forbidden'
Local LLM deployment with no external calls; matches 'retrieval-free deployment discipline' albeit weaker on K-prototype angle
Internal cognitive map building; tangential, no retrieval-free/small-K framing
Map emergence in blind agents; tangential to memorize-then-deploy

fail_reason: Four results (ranks 2-5) independently exceed both sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7 thresholds. Air-gapped/sovereign LLM deployment with fine-tuning + disabled retrieval/RAG/web access is well-established prior art (NVIDIA NIM air-gap guide, Prem AI air-gapped fine-tuning, NexaStack sovereign inference, local LLM privacy deployment 2025). The 'small-K prototype curation' is the only marginally novel framing element, but the overall regime of 'heavily fine-tune then deploy with retrieval explicitly disabled in air-gapped settings' is squarely covered by existing 2024-2025 industry practice. Cross-agent verification confirms original 07_hit_miss.json scoring; total_hits=4 >= 1, so candidate FAILS novelty.
agreement_with_original: concur: original 07_hit_miss.json also found 4 hits (ranks 2-5) via the same semantic/functional thresholds; verifier independently reproduces this outcome
